info.title: AirLabs Data API
info.description: AirLabs Data API provides real-time and reference aviation data including flight tracking, airport information, airline databases, schedules, delays, routes, fleets, and geographic search.

get.description: Test connectivity and health of the API.

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: Your API key from the account dashboard.

get.description: Get real-time global flight positioning data.

parameters.name: bbox
parameters.description: Bounding box coordinates (SW Lat, SW Long, NE Lat, NE Long).

parameters.name: zoom
parameters.description: Map zoom level (0-11) to filter flights.

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: Filter by airline country ISO 2 code.

get.description: Get detailed information for a specific flight.

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: Minimum delayed time in minutes (> 30 min).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max items to return (500 standard, 50 free).

get.description: Get airline information from the global airlines database.
Get airport information from the global airports database.
Get city information from the world cities database.
Get country information from the countries database.
Find airports and cities near a geographic location.

post.description: Create a session for managing API access with session-based authentication.
Configure an alert to be notified of flight status changes.

get.description: Autocomplete suggestions for airports, cities, and countries.

status.description: Flight status: scheduled, en-route, or landed.

apiKey.name: api_key
apiKey.description: API key passed as a query parameter.
